---
title: "Modelling TB Transmission Dynamics in Kenya (2000–2022)"
author: "Fiona Huini"
date: "2026-05-10"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
    self-contained: true

---

## Background

## Methods

## Results

## Discussion

## Limitations

## References
